truths.text: Have you ever lied to your friends about something important?
What's something you've done that you think nobody knows about?
Who do you have a crush on right now?
What's the strangest dream you've ever had?
When was the last time you cried?
What's the worst advice you've ever given?
Have you ever cheated on a test?
What's the most you've ever spent on something pointless?
If you could confess one secret to this group, what would it be?

dares.text: Do your best impression of someone in this room.
Call someone and sing 'Happy Birthday' to them.
Do 20 push-ups while making funny faces.
Send a funny text to your crush.
Act like an animal for 30 seconds.
Dance to a song without music.
Speak with an accent for the next 5 turns.
Do the macarena in the middle of the room.
Compliment everyone in this room on something specific.
